highlights: The AI landscape is rapidly advancing with significant developments in agentic AI, including specialized research agents, local voice assistants, and safety frameworks, alongside new benchmarks for complex tool-use and reasoning.

Major players like Alibaba and OpenAI are pushing the boundaries with frontier multimodal models, while specialized models for healthcare and text-to-SQL tasks are addressing domain-specific intelligence needs.

There's a growing emphasis on efficient local LLMs and flexible cloud-agnostic deployment, supported by new tools and integrations from NVIDIA and Hugging Face that empower developers to build and scale AI solutions across diverse environments.

agents.title: Google Cloud’s Always-On Memory Agent
agents.summary: Google Cloud introduced an Always-On Memory Agent, a reference implementation using continuous LLM consolidation on Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, which replaces traditional RAG and embeddings for persistent memory management without vector databases.

agents.title: AnovaX: A Local, Multi-Agent Voice Assistant with LLM Planning
agents.summary: AnovaX is a local-first, multi-agent voice assistant that runs entirely on the user's desktop, using an LLM planner and specialized child agents to automate complex tasks, offering robust adaptive recovery and remote control capabilities.

agents.title: SeerGuard: A Safety Framework for Mobile GUI Agents via World Model Prediction
agents.summary: SeerGuard is a new safety framework that prevents critical errors in mobile GUI agents by performing pre-execution instruction-level screening and action-level risk assessment through a unified safety-augmented world model.

models.title: Alibaba Previews Qwen3.8-Max, a 2.4 Trillion-Parameter Multimodal Model
models.summary: Alibaba's Qwen team previewed Qwen3.8-Max, a 2.4 trillion-parameter multimodal MoE model positioned as a frontier intelligence, now available for preview on Token Plan and Qoder.

models.title: GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition
models.summary: OpenAI has released GPT-5.6, a new frontier model offering increased intelligence, stronger performance per dollar, and enhanced capabilities for demanding workloads, now also the preferred model for Microsoft 365 Copilot.

models.title: Feyn AI Releases SQRL, a Text-to-SQL Model Family That Inspects the Database
models.summary: Feyn Labs launched SQRL, a text-to-SQL model family that inspects databases with read-only probes before generating queries, achieving 70.6% execution accuracy on BIRD Dev and offering self-hostable checkpoints.

tools.title: NVIDIA Released DeepStream 9.1: Bringing Agentic AI to Vision AI
tools.summary: NVIDIA DeepStream 9.1 introduces 13 agentic skills enabling natural-language pipeline creation for multi-camera video analytics, alongside Multi-View 3D Tracking and AutoMagicCalib for simplified calibration.

tools.title: ToolVerse: Unlocking Massive Environments and Long-Horizon Tasks for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
tools.summary: ToolVerse is a comprehensive framework that scales agentic RL environments, building massive executable training grounds from nearly 400 real-world protocols and enabling agents to perform complex, long-horizon reasoning with extensive tool integration.

tools.title: Expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API: background tasks, remote MCP and more
tools.summary: Google is expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API with new capabilities like background tasks and remote Model Context Protocols, enabling developers to build more reliable and production-ready agents.

companies.title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
companies.summary: OpenAI announced that GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model powering Microsoft 365 Copilot, delivering stronger AI capabilities across various applications like Word, Excel, and PowerPoint for enhanced productivity.

companies.title: A scorecard for the AI age
companies.summary: OpenAI's CFO, Sarah Friar, introduced a practical AI scorecard for enterprises to measure ROI by focusing on useful work generated, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.

companies.title: How Cars24 scales conversations and builds faster with OpenAI
companies.summary: Cars24 leveraged OpenAI-powered voice and chat agents to manage over 1 million monthly conversation minutes, recover 12% of lost leads, and implement agentic workflows across their organization.

learning.title: Fine-Tuning Qwen3 with LoRA Using NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel: A Complete Single-GPU Google Colab Workflow Tutorial
learning.summary: A comprehensive Google Colab tutorial demonstrates an end-to-end workflow for fine-tuning Qwen3 with LoRA using NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel on a single GPU, covering installation, precision adaptation, and result comparison.

learning.title: What building Shippy taught us about building agents
learning.summary: This blog post shares valuable lessons learned from developing 'Shippy,' an agent, providing practical insights and best practices for others embarking on agent-building projects.

learning.title: How data science teams use ChatGPT Work
learning.summary: This article details how data science teams can leverage ChatGPT Work to streamline tasks such as creating root-cause briefs, impact readouts, KPI memos, scoped analyses, and dashboard specifications from real-world data inputs.
